content.json:
# 🛡️ SpyCloud Threat Intelligence Dashboard
**Darknet exposure monitoring** — breach credentials, infostealer infections, phished accounts, and automated remediation.

> Charts show *no data* until the SpyCloud connector is activated and data begins flowing (5–10 min after Connect).

---

parameters.name: SeverityFilter
parameters.query: SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | distinct severity | order by severity desc
parameters.label: Severity

parameters.name: DomainFilter
parameters.query: SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where isnotempty(email_domain) | distinct email_domain | order by email_domain asc | take 50
parameters.label: Email Domain

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)["🔍 Total Exposures",0,1,"👤 Unique Users",0,2,"💻 Infected Devices",0,3,"🔴 Critical (Sev 25)",0,4,"🟠 High (Sev 20)",0,5,"🔑 Plaintext PWs",0,6,"🛡️ MDE Actions",0,7,"🔒 CA Actions",0,8]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=count() | extend Label="🔍 Total Exposures", Order=1 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=dcount(email) | extend Label="👤 Unique Users", Order=2 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20 | summarize v=dcount(infected_machine_id) | extend Label="💻 Infected Devices", Order=3 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity == 25 | summarize v=count() | extend Label="🔴 Critical (Sev 25)", Order=4 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity == 20 | summarize v=count() | extend Label="🟠 High (Sev 20)", Order=5 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(password_plaintext) | summarize v=count() | extend Label="🔑 Plaintext PWs", Order=6 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=count() | extend Label="🛡️ MDE Actions", Order=7 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=count() | extend Label="🔒 CA Actions", Order=8 | project Label, Value=v, Order)
| summarize Value=max(Value) by Label, Order
| order by Order asc

union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), tostring(severity)
| extend SeverityLabel = case(severity == "25", "P1 Critical", severity == "20", "P1 High", severity == "5", "P3 Standard", severity == "2", "P4 Low", strcat("Other (", severity, ")"))
| project TimeGenerated, SeverityLabel, Count)
content.title: Exposure Trend by Severity

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend SeverityLabel = case(severity == 25, "P1 Critical", severity == 20, "P1 High", severity == 5, "P3 Standard", severity == 2, "P4 Low", strcat("Other (", tostring(severity), ")"))
| summarize Count=count() by SeverityLabel)
content.title: Severity Distribution

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Count=count() by tostring(breach_category))
content.title: Breach Category Breakdown

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(email)
| summarize Exposures=count(), MaxSev=max(severity), PlaintextPWs=countif(isnotempty(password_plaintext)), Domains=dcount(target_domain), Sources=dcount(source_id), Latest=max(TimeGenerated) by email
| top 25 by MaxSev desc, Exposures desc
| extend SevIndicator = case(MaxSev == 25, "🔴 CRITICAL", MaxSev == 20, "🟠 HIGH", MaxSev == 5, "🟡 STANDARD", "🔵 LOW")
| project email, SevIndicator, Exposures, PlaintextPWs, Domains, Sources, Latest)
content.title: Top 25 Most Exposed Users

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(password_type)
| summarize Count=count() by tostring(password_type)
| order by Count desc
| take 15)
content.title: Password Type Distribution

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(target_domain)
| summarize Exposures=count(), UniqueUsers=dcount(email) by tostring(target_domain)
| order by Exposures desc
| take 20)
content.title: Top Targeted Domains

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(email_domain)
| summarize Exposures=count(), UniqueUsers=dcount(email) by tostring(email_domain)
| order by Exposures desc
| take 15)
content.title: Top Exposed Email Domains

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20 and isnotempty(infected_machine_id)
| summarize Users=dcount(email), MaxSev=max(severity), Domains=dcount(target_domain), Latest=max(TimeGenerated) by tostring(infected_machine_id), tostring(user_hostname)
| top 25 by MaxSev desc, Users desc
| extend SevIndicator = case(MaxSev == 25, "🔴 CRITICAL", MaxSev == 20, "🟠 HIGH", "🟡 OTHER")
| project infected_machine_id, user_hostname, SevIndicator, Users, Domains, Latest)
content.title: Top 25 Infected Devices

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(breach_title)
| summarize Count=count() by tostring(breach_title)
| order by Count desc
| take 15)
content.title: Top Malware Families / Breach Sources

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20 and isnotempty(country_code)
| summarize Devices=dcount(infected_machine_id), Users=dcount(email) by tostring(country_code)
| order by Devices desc
| take 20)
content.title: Infections by Country

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20 and isnotempty(user_os)
| summarize Devices=dcount(infected_machine_id) by tostring(user_os)
| order by Devices desc
| take 10)
content.title: Infected Device OS Distribution

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Emails=dcountif(email, isnotempty(email)), Phones=countif(isnotempty(phone)), SSNs=countif(isnotempty(national_id)), DOBs=countif(isnotempty(dob)), Addresses=countif(isnotempty(address_1)), Names=countif(isnotempty(full_name))
| extend dummy=1
| project Emails, Phones, SSNs, DOBs, Addresses, Names
| evaluate pivot(pack_array("Emails", "Phones", "SSNs", "DOBs", "Addresses", "Names")))
content.title: PII Types Exposed

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)["🖥️ MDE Isolations",0,1,"🔒 CA Resets/Revokes",0,2,"⚠️ High-Sev Users",0,3,"🔴 Critical Devices",0,4]),
(Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=count() | extend Label="🖥️ MDE Isolations", Order=1 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=count() | extend Label="🔒 CA Resets/Revokes", Order=2 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20 | summarize v=dcount(email) | extend Label="⚠️ High-Sev Users", Order=3 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity == 25 | summarize v=dcount(infected_machine_id) | extend Label="🔴 Critical Devices", Order=4 | project Label, Value=v, Order)
| summarize Value=max(Value) by Label, Order
| order by Order asc
content.title: Remediation Summary

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Actions=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d))
content.title: MDE Device Isolation Timeline

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Actions=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d))
content.title: CA Remediation Timeline

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by source_id
| project source_id, breach_title, status, description, TimeGenerated
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50)
content.title: Recent Breach Catalog Entries

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudCompassData_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Exposures=count(), Users=dcount(email), Devices=dcount(infected_machine_id), MaxSev=max(severity) by breach_category
| order by Exposures desc)
content.title: Compass Exposures by Category

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudCompassDevices_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Infections=count(), AvgApps=avg(application_count) by user_hostname, user_os
| top 20 by Infections desc)
content.title: Top Compass Infected Devices

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudCompassData_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| join kind=inner (SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | distinct email) on email
| summarize CompassHits=count(), Domains=dcount(target_domain) by email
| top 15 by CompassHits desc)
content.title: Compass + Corporate Overlap (Shared Users)

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)["SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL",0,datetime(null),datetime(null),0,"🔴 No Data","SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL",0,datetime(null),datetime(null),0,"🔴 No Data","Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL",0,datetime(null),datetime(null),0,"🔴 No Data","SpyCloud_CA_Logs_CL",0,datetime(null),datetime(null),0,"🔴 No Data"]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | summarize Records=count(), Latest=max(TimeGenerated), Earliest=min(TimeGenerated) | extend Table="SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL", AgeHours=datetime_diff('hour',now(),Latest) | extend Status=case(AgeHours<=1,"🟢 Active",AgeHours<=6,"🟡 Delayed",AgeHours<=24,"🟠 Stale","🔴 No Data")),
(SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL | summarize Records=count(), Latest=max(TimeGenerated), Earliest=min(TimeGenerated) | extend Table="SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL", AgeHours=datetime_diff('hour',now(),Latest) | extend Status=case(AgeHours<=1,"🟢 Active",AgeHours<=6,"🟡 Delayed",AgeHours<=24,"🟠 Stale","🔴 No Data")),
(Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL | summarize Records=count(), Latest=max(TimeGenerated), Earliest=min(TimeGenerated) | extend Table="Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL", AgeHours=datetime_diff('hour',now(),Latest) | extend Status=case(AgeHours<=1,"🟢 Active",AgeHours<=6,"🟡 Delayed",AgeHours<=24,"🟠 Stale","🔴 No Data")),
(SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | summarize Records=count(), Latest=max(TimeGenerated), Earliest=min(TimeGenerated) | extend Table="SpyCloud_CA_Logs_CL", AgeHours=datetime_diff('hour',now(),Latest) | extend Status=case(AgeHours<=1,"🟢 Active",AgeHours<=6,"🟡 Delayed",AgeHours<=24,"🟠 Stale","🔴 No Data"))
| summarize Records=max(Records), Earliest=max(Earliest), Latest=max(Latest), AgeHours=min(AgeHours), Status=max(Status) by Table
,
(SpyCloudCompassData_CL | summarize Records=count(), Latest=max(TimeGenerated), Earliest=min(TimeGenerated) | extend Table="SpyCloudCompassData_CL", AgeHours=datetime_diff('hour',now(),Latest) | extend Status=case(AgeHours<=1,"🟢 Active",AgeHours<=6,"🟡 Delayed",AgeHours<=24,"🟠 Stale","🔴 No Data")),
(SpyCloudCompassDevices_CL | summarize Records=count(), Latest=max(TimeGenerated), Earliest=min(TimeGenerated) | extend Table="SpyCloudCompassDevices_CL", AgeHours=datetime_diff('hour',now(),Latest) | extend Status=case(AgeHours<=1,"🟢 Active",AgeHours<=6,"🟡 Delayed",AgeHours<=24,"🟠 Stale","🔴 No Data"))
| summarize Records=max(Records), Earliest=max(Earliest), Latest=max(Latest), AgeHours=min(AgeHours), Status=max(Status) by Table
| order by Records desc
content.title: Data Pipeline Health

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | extend Table="Watchlist"),
(SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | extend Table="Catalog")
content.title: Daily Ingestion Volume
